text.title: langchain-chains Output Contract
text.summary: Chain config envelope schema and four canonical pattern shapes.

section.title: Chain config envelope
Sequential
section.code: chain = prompt | model | parser result = chain.invoke({"input": "..."})

section.title: Router (RunnableBranch)
section.code: branch = RunnableBranch( (lambda x: route(x) == "math", math_chain), (lambda x: route(x) == "code", code_chain), general_chain, # default fallback )

section.title: MapReduce via asyncio.gather
section.code: async def map_reduce(docs: list[str]) -> str: tasks = [summarize_chain.ainvoke({"document": d}) for d in docs] summaries = await asyncio.gather(*tasks) return await combine_chain.ainvoke({"summaries": "\n\n".join(summaries)})

section.title: Fallback (scoped exceptions)
section.code:
from openai import RateLimitError, APITimeoutError
robust = primary.with_fallbacks( [fallback_a, fallback_b], exceptions_to_handle=(RateLimitError, APITimeoutError), )

example.note: Empty exception list defaults to catching everything; chain not at module level. Validator rejects.
